target.profile_basis: RCH ts1 full fj-dispatch profile on 2026-06-06 measured vmap_gather/batched_operand_batched_indices at 21.138 us [20.431,22.539].

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-dispatch-pass4-profile-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.name: zero_copy_prepared_gather_indices
candidate.lever: Changed PreparedGatherIndices to borrow tensor index slices instead of cloning tensor.elements.to_vec(); scalar indices stayed owned.
candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-jmtvm-candidate-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_gather/batched_operand_batched_indices --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
candidate.rejection_reason: Same-worker RCH rebench regressed the target row; Score < 2.0.

behavior_isomorphism.reason_no_expanded_golden: The candidate failed the performance keep gate and was removed before commit.

output dtype and shape remain baseline because no source was kept

compile_gate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-jmtvm-check-rch-target rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets

next_deeper_primitive.direction: Do not continue with PreparedGatherIndices ownership/view tweaks; attack a different data-movement structure such as direct dense-I64 gather/scatter kernels or a compiled linalg artifact with clear non-overlap.
next_deeper_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.25x same-worker midpoint with conservative interval not worse than baseline
